Cryptocurrency Aave Decreases More Than 3% Within 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Aave's (CRYPTO: AAVE) price has fallen 3.1% to $152.81. This continues its negative trend over the past week where it has experienced a 6.0% loss, moving from $162.87 to its current price.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Optimism Down More Than 3% Within 24 hours
data.description: Optimism's (CRYPTO: OP) price has decreased 3.24% over the past 24 hours to $1.71, continuing its downward trend over the past week of -3.0%, moving from $1.77 to its current price.
